blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
